title: The Homesickness Nobody Warns You About
summary: Understand the delayed homesickness phase and respond with structure.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: A warm call with home ends and your room feels suddenly unfamiliar again.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: You are functioning, but there is an ache that keeps returning.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Homesickness often peaks after novelty fades, not when you first arrive.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Use scheduled contact, local rituals, and one ongoing community thread.

Avoid living only in digital memory loops of home.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find community and cultural groups near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Finding Your Community - turning connection into belonging infrastructure.
